raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year> I purchased a lawn mower from Home Depot with my HD store  card for XXXX Within XXXX hours, I logged into my account online to pay my bill and saw a charge I didn't recognize for XXXX. Home Depot online statement does not provide a description of items purchased so I called them. They said it was for plumbing fixtures and accessories ( which I did not purchase ) so I told them it was a fraudulent charge. They said they would put it in dispute, cancel my card, and issue me a new card. I went ahead and paid for the lawn mower. 
Right after that call, I ran some errands for a few XXXX and when I got home I got a text message from Home Depot asking if I had just made a purchase for XXXX so I called them again. I was told that the new purchase had been made on the new card ( which had not even been issued to me yet. Again they said they'd put it in dispute and issue me a XXXX card. I told them not to bother- to just cancel the card. 
Today ( XX/XX/XXXX ) I received an email notifying me that the issue had been resolved and that there's no evidence of fraud and that I owe them XXXX 
This is crazy. What can I do?
